member.name: M:TokenCounter.CountTokens(System.String)
member.summary: Counts tokens in a given text using SharpToken
member.param: The text to count tokens for
member.returns: Number of tokens in the text

member.name: M:TokenCounter.CountTotalTokens(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{System.String})
member.summary: Calculates total tokens for a collection of documents

member.name: M:TokenCounter.AnalyzeTokens(System.String)
member.summary: Provides detailed token analysis for a given text
member.returns: Tuple with token count and token preview

member.name: M:TokenCounter.FilterDocumentsByTokenLimit(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Int32)
member.summary: Filters documents to stay within a maximum token limit
